calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2004 Continued To Aug-23-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Northpoint Apartments
No appearance by the Defendant: Kathryn Hill.
9:45 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Mahara Espinoza, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Three day notice dtd. 7-19-04-------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at:
365 North Point St., #401, San Francisco.
Damages $2,416.56
Attorney's Fees and Costs per noticed motion.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Off Calendar
